name: Academy Park
description: Academy Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Franklin, TN. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.

description: Come play pickleball at Bethesda Outdoor Recreational Complex in Thompson's Station, TN! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water.

name: Franklin Recreation Complex
description: Franklin Recreation Complex is a place to play pickleball in Franklin, TN. There are 8 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to food, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
